name: Fresnel Edge Glow
description: Edge glow effect based on view angle
technique: dot(viewDir normal) to drive emissive intensity
keywords: fresnel edge glow emissive view angle
glsl_snippet_hint: pow(1.0 - dot(vNormal viewDir) uPower) * uIntensity

name: Simplex Noise Displacement
description: Organic vertex displacement using simplex noise
technique: simplex3D(position + time) applied to vertex positions
keywords: simplex noise vertex displacement organic
glsl_snippet_hint: position += normal * snoise(position * uScale + uTime) * uStrength

name: Chromatic Aberration
description: RGB channel offset creating lens distortion
technique: Sample R G B channels at offset UVs
keywords: chromatic aberration rgb split post
glsl_snippet_hint: texture2D(tDiffuse uv + offset * uStrength).r

name: Volumetric God Rays
description: Light shaft rays from a light source
technique: Radial blur from light position in screen space
keywords: god rays volumetric light shaft radial
glsl_snippet_hint: radialBlur(tDiffuse lightPos uExposure uDecay)

name: Iridescent Surface
description: Rainbow oil-slick color shift based on angle
technique: Map view angle to hue rotation via HSL
keywords: iridescence rainbow oil slick hue shift
glsl_snippet_hint: hue = dot(vNormal viewDir) * 360.0 * uSpeed

name: Cloth Wave Shader
technique: Sine wave on Y axis with phase offset per vertex
keywords: cloth wave fabric sine deformation
glsl_snippet_hint: pos.z += sin(pos.x * uFrequency + uTime) * uAmplitude

name: Cel Toon Outline
technique: Expand vertices along normals for outline pass
keywords: toon cel shading outline cartoon
glsl_snippet_hint: gl_Position = vec4(pos + normal * uOutlineWidth)

name: Point Sprite Particles
description: Circular soft point sprites for particles
technique: Distance from center of gl_PointCoord
keywords: point sprite particles circular soft
glsl_snippet_hint: float d = length(gl_PointCoord - 0.5); alpha = 1.0 - smoothstep(0.4 0.5 d)

name: Plasma Field
description: Colorful plasma effect using sine wave combos
technique: Multiple overlapping sine waves summed
keywords: plasma field sine waves colorful
glsl_snippet_hint: color = sin(uv.x*6.28+uTime) + sin(uv.y*6.28+uTime*0.5)

name: Water Normal Map
description: Animated water surface with normal mapping
technique: Scroll normal map + additive wave on vertex
keywords: water normal map animated surface waves
glsl_snippet_hint: pos.y += sin(pos.x*uFreq + uTime) * cos(pos.z*uFreq + uTime) * uWaveHeight

name: Hologram Scanlines
technique: Repeating scanline pattern + fresnel + alpha
keywords: hologram scanlines alpha fresnel sci-fi
glsl_snippet_hint: alpha *= step(0.5 fract(vUv.y * uLineFreq + uTime * 0.1))

name: Glitch RGB Split
description: Pixel glitch with RGB channel displacement
technique: Random time-based UV offset per channel
keywords: glitch rgb split pixel displacement
glsl_snippet_hint: uv.x += sin(uTime * uSpeed) * uIntensity * random(floor(uv.y * 20.0))

name: Liquid Metal
technique: Environment map + perturbed normals + high specularity
keywords: liquid metal chrome reflection environment map
glsl_snippet_hint: vec3 ref = reflect(viewDir perturbedNormal); color = textureCube(uEnvMap ref)

name: Heat Haze Distortion
technique: Wavy UV displacement on screen texture
keywords: heat haze distortion wavy uv screen
glsl_snippet_hint: uv += sin(uv.y * 20.0 + uTime) * uStrength * 0.01

name: Portal Warp
technique: Polar coordinates + rotation + color
keywords: portal warp polar coordinates swirl rotation
glsl_snippet_hint: float angle = atan(uv.y uv.x) + uTime; color = mix(uColor1 uColor2 sin(angle * 5.0))

name: Star Field
technique: Random points with time-based opacity flicker
keywords: star field twinkle random points
glsl_snippet_hint: opacity = abs(sin(rand(vUv) * 6.28 + uTime * rand(vUv.yx)))

name: Voronoi Cracks
description: Voronoi cell edge pattern for cracks/cells
technique: Voronoi distance field
keywords: voronoi cracks cells distance field
glsl_snippet_hint: float d = voronoi(uv * uScale + uTime * 0.1); color = uColor * (1.0 - d)

name: Depth Fog
technique: gl_FragCoord.z to mix with fog color
keywords: depth fog distance z buffer blend
glsl_snippet_hint: float fogFactor = smoothstep(uFogNear uFogFar gl_FragCoord.z / gl_FragCoord.w)

name: Fire Particle Shader
technique: Noise-based alpha dissolve from bottom to top
keywords: fire particle flame noise dissolve upward
glsl_snippet_hint: alpha = 1.0 - smoothstep(0.0 1.0 vUv.y + snoise(vUv * 3.0 + uTime) * 0.3)

name: Bokeh Depth of Field
technique: Circle of confusion based on depth
keywords: bokeh depth of field lens blur coc
glsl_snippet_hint: float coc = abs(depth - uFocusDepth) * uAperture; blur = min(coc uMaxBlur)

name: MatCap Material
description: Fake environment reflection using matcap texture
technique: Transform normal to view space → sample 2D matcap
keywords: matcap material fake reflection view normal
glsl_snippet_hint: vec2 matcapUV = normalize(mat3(viewMatrix) * vNormal).xy * 0.5 + 0.5

name: Pulsing Outline
technique: Expanded normals with sin-wave opacity
keywords: pulsing outline glow animated sin wave
glsl_snippet_hint: float pulse = abs(sin(uTime * uSpeed)); outlineAlpha = pulse * uIntensity

name: Procedural Noise Texture
technique: fBm layered octaves of value noise
keywords: procedural fbm fractal noise texture octaves
glsl_snippet_hint: float n = fbm(uv * uScale + uTime * 0.1 uOctaves)

name: Dissolve Transition
technique: Compare noise value to dissolve threshold
keywords: dissolve noise threshold transition edge
glsl_snippet_hint: float n = texture2D(uNoise vUv).r; alpha = step(uThreshold n); edge = step(uThreshold - 0.05 n) - step(uThreshold n)

name: Motion Trail Fade
description: Object leaves fading trail behind it
technique: Render to texture + blend previous frame
keywords: motion trail fade previous frame blend
glsl_snippet_hint: color = mix(texture2D(uMotionTex vUv) currentColor uDecay)

name: Rim Light
technique: View angle to drive bright rim
keywords: rim light backlit view angle highlight
glsl_snippet_hint: float rim = pow(1.0 - dot(vNormal viewDir) uRimPower) * uRimIntensity

name: Sky Gradient
technique: Y-position based color mixing
keywords: sky gradient color stop y position
glsl_snippet_hint: color = mix(uBotColor uMidColor smoothstep(0.0 0.5 vUv.y))

name: Electric Lightning
technique: FBM noise on UV creating jagged line
keywords: electricity lightning procedural fbm jagged
glsl_snippet_hint: float line = abs(fbm(vec2(vUv.x * 10.0 uTime * uSpeed)) - vUv.y) * 20.0

name: CRT Scanline
technique: Alternating dark lines + vignette
keywords: crt scanline retro monitor dark lines
glsl_snippet_hint: float scan = sin(vUv.y * uLineSpacing * 3.14159) * uIntensity

name: Soap Bubble Iridescence
technique: Angle-based color interference pattern
keywords: soap bubble thin film iridescence interference
glsl_snippet_hint: vec3 col = 0.5 + 0.5 * cos(uTime + uThickness * viewDot + vec3(0 2.09 4.19))

name: Warp Speed Streaks
technique: Elongated star points along camera axis
keywords: warp speed streaks star elongation camera axis
glsl_snippet_hint: pos += normalize(pos) * uSpeed * uStreakLength

name: Crystal Refraction
technique: Environment map + IOR-based refraction
keywords: crystal refraction ior environment chromatic
glsl_snippet_hint: vec3 refracted = refract(viewDir normal 1.0/uIOR); color = textureCube(uEnvMap refracted)

name: 2D Fluid Simulation
technique: Navier-Stokes simplified on GPU texture
keywords: fluid simulation navier stokes gpu texture
glsl_snippet_hint: advect(uVelocity uDensity uDt)

name: Glowing Wireframe
technique: Barycentric coordinates for edge detection
keywords: wireframe glow neon barycentric edges
glsl_snippet_hint: float edge = min(min(vBary.x vBary.y) vBary.z); glow = 1.0 - smoothstep(0.0 uGlowWidth edge)

name: Volumetric Smoke
technique: Raymarching through density field
keywords: volumetric smoke raymarching density field
glsl_snippet_hint: for(int i=0; i<uSteps; i++) { pos += dir * stepSize; density += sample(pos uTime); }

name: Mirror Reflection
technique: Flip UV on Y axis for floor/wall mirror
keywords: mirror reflection planar render texture flip
glsl_snippet_hint: vec2 reflectUV = vec2(vUv.x 1.0 - vUv.y); color = texture2D(uReflectTex reflectUV)

name: Gradient Sky Dome
technique: Hemisphere gradient using vertex Y
keywords: sky dome gradient hemisphere vertex y sun
glsl_snippet_hint: color = mix(uHorizonColor uSkyColor smoothstep(0.0 0.5 vNormal.y))

name: Lava Lamp Blobs
technique: SDF-based metaball field summation
keywords: lava lamp metaball sdf field blobs
glsl_snippet_hint: float field = sum of 1.0/distance(uv ball[i]) for each ball

name: ASCII Art Shader
description: Convert scene to ASCII character art
technique: Sample brightness → map to ASCII character index
keywords: ascii art shader brightness character map
glsl_snippet_hint: float brightness = dot(color vec3(0.299 0.587 0.114)); index = floor(brightness * numChars)

name: Film Grain
technique: Random noise texture overlay with time seed
keywords: film grain noise cinematic overlay
glsl_snippet_hint: float grain = fract(sin(dot(vUv * uSize vec2(12.9898 78.233)) + uTime) * 43758.5453)

name: Color Grading LUT
description: Apply cinematic color grade via 3D LUT
technique: Sample 3D LUT texture for color transform
keywords: color grading lut 3d lookup table
glsl_snippet_hint: vec3 lutColor = texture3D(uLUT clamp(color 0.0 1.0)).rgb

name: Speed Lines
technique: Radial lines from center point
keywords: speed lines radial manga anime center
glsl_snippet_hint: float angle = atan(uv.y - uCenter.y uv.x - uCenter.x); line = step(0.98 fract(angle * uSpeed))

name: VHS Glitch
technique: Horizontal scanline jitter + color bleed
keywords: vhs glitch tape artifact horizontal jitter
glsl_snippet_hint: uv.x += sin(floor(uv.y * 200.0 + uTime * 10.0)) * uIntensity * 0.02

name: Hexagon Grid Pattern
technique: HEX tiling function on UV
keywords: hexagon grid hex tiling animated overlay
glsl_snippet_hint: vec2 hexUV = hexTile(uv * uSize); color = smoothstep(uGap uGap+0.02 hexDist(hexUV))

name: Perlin Cloud
description: Soft volumetric cloud using perlin noise
technique: FBM layered octaves with density threshold
keywords: perlin cloud fbm octaves density soft
glsl_snippet_hint: float cloud = smoothstep(uDensity 1.0 fbm(uv * uScale + uTime * 0.05 6))

name: Pixel Sorting
technique: Sort pixels by brightness along axis
keywords: pixel sort brightness axis glitch art
glsl_snippet_hint: sorted = pixelSort(scanline uThreshold uAxis)

name: Edge Detection
technique: Sobel kernel convolution on screen texture
keywords: edge detection sobel outline stylized
glsl_snippet_hint: vec3 edge = sobelKernel(tDiffuse vUv texelSize) * uStrength

name: Underwater Caustics
technique: Layered voronoi patterns summed
keywords: caustics underwater light animated voronoi
glsl_snippet_hint: float c = voronoiLayer(uv uTime uScale) + voronoiLayer(uv * 1.3 uTime * 0.8 uScale * 0.7)

name: Subsurface Scattering
technique: Approximate SSS via thickness + wrap lighting
keywords: subsurface scattering thickness translucent light
glsl_snippet_hint: float sss = pow(max(0.0 dot(-lightDir normal) + uWrap) uPower) * uThickness * uScatterColor
